title: Catalog Index (lightweight bootstrap payload)
description: Compact payload served at /api/catalog-index.json. Contains a stub for every Use Case in the catalogue plus the small bootstrap dictionaries the SPA needs before the user opens a category. Per-UC heavy fields (full SPL, implementation prose, references, dashboards) live in /api/cat-N.json and are lazy-fetched when a detail panel opens. Renaming or removing fields requires bumping the major component of `version` and a full deprecation cycle (see docs/api-versioning.md). Adding new optional fields is non-breaking and bumps the minor component.
x-stability-note: v7.0 ships this surface as preview while the lazy bootstrap is hardened in production. Promotion to `stable` happens at v7.1.

version.description: Semver of this payload shape, NOT of the catalogue content.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp; set to git commit time when --reproducible.

site.description: Site-wide settings — mirrors window.SITE_CUSTOM in the SPA.

catGroups.description: High-level domain grouping (infra/security/cloud/...) → array of category ids.

catMeta.description: Per-category icon/desc/quick-start metadata. Keyed by stringified category id.

equipment.description: Equipment catalogue (TAs, vendors, models). Same structure as the legacy EQUIPMENT global.

filterFacets.description: Pre-computed facet values for the filter UI (dtype, premium, mitre groups, ...).

recentlyAdded.description: UC ids added since the previous catalogue release (drives the New badge).

categories.description: One entry per top-level category. Subcategory metadata is included here; full UC payloads are NOT inlined in this object — fetch the corresponding `lazyHref` for the full per-category payload.

lazyHref.description: Path to the per-category JSON the SPA fetches on demand.

ucs.description: Lightweight stubs for every UC. Order is stable: sorted by [cat, sub, uc] numerically. Heavy fields (q, m, md, kfp, refs, screenshots, ...) are NOT included. The SPA's bootstrap loader reconstructs window.DATA from this list; the detail panel lazy-fetches /api/cat-{cat}.json to fill in the heavy fields.

i.description: Use case identifier in CAT.SUB.UC form (no `UC-` prefix).

regulations.description: Regulation framework summaries used by /regulation/<slug>/ pages and the regulation filter dropdown. Heavy fields (full clause text, OSCAL, OLIR mappings) live in dist/regulation/<slug>/index.json (emitted by render_pages, not by this index).

ucCount.description: Distinct UCs that map to at least one clause in this framework.
